# Study graph snapshot contract

- Parent: [README.md](./README.md)
- Formal index: [../FORMAL_LEDGER.md](../FORMAL_LEDGER.md)

Versioned **semantic graph** export for qualitative / mixed-methods workflows (`schemaVersion: 1.0.0`).

## Scope

- **Structural validation only** — TypeScript: `@a0n/gnosis/study-graph-snapshot` (`validateStudyGraphSnapshot`).
- **Publish policy gate** — `@a0n/gnosis/study-publish-gate` (`evaluateStudyPublishGate`): confirmatory / mixed require `preregistration_ref`; confirmatory requires at least one `hypothesis` node.
- This contract does **not** certify interpretive truth, participant experience, or IRB approval.

## CLI

- `pnpm run validate:study-snapshot` — valid fixture path (from `open-source/gnosis`).
- `pnpm run evaluate:study-publish-gate` — gate on valid confirmatory fixture.

## See also

- [ECOLOGY_PILOT_SPEC.md](./ECOLOGY_PILOT_SPEC.md) — parallel graph snapshot pattern.
- [ARENA_MERGE_GATE.md](./ARENA_MERGE_GATE.md) — merge-gate composition style.
- [STUDY_PARTICIPANT_DATA_POLICY.md](./STUDY_PARTICIPANT_DATA_POLICY.md) — where participant/consent data may live (Dash / Knotchain / Edgework; not Firebase/D1 as SoR).
- [STUDY_FORMS_AND_PROGRESSIVE_DISCLOSURE.md](./STUDY_FORMS_AND_PROGRESSIVE_DISCLOSURE.md) — forms strategy and progressive disclosure.
